title: Add primaryUseCase typed-enum field to AIModelFamily entry
description: Substrate's harness scheduler will benefit from a typed primary-use-case dimension when filtering families per form's needs. Proposed enum cases: `generalPurpose` (broad chat / completion — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, Mistral), `codeSpecialty` (code-generation focused — Codex, possibly Phi-code variants), `reasoningTier` (explicit thinking models — o1/o3, R1, Gemini thinking, Claude extended thinking — note this overlaps but isn't identical to `reasoningCapability == providerExposedReasoning`), `multimodalNative` (vision/audio/video natively integrated — Gemini, Qwen-multimodal), `smallOnDevice` (small models optimized for local — Phi, Apple Foundation), `enterpriseFocused` (Cohere, Bedrock-tier). Populate per family. Add as enum file. Note: this is partially derivable from existing fields (reasoningCapability + modalities + archProfile), but the explicit type makes scheduler logic cleaner.
